'''Gold 5''' was the designation of a [[BTL-A4 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-A4 Y-wing]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. It was flown by [[Davish Krail/Legends|Davish "Pops" Krail]], and he personally supervised all repairs and maintenance conducted on the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]].<ref name="CCG-Gold5" /> Gold 5 was destroyed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. After [[Jon Vander/Legends|Jon Vander]] and [[Tiree/Legends|Tiree's]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] were destroyed attempting to launch [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] into the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Thermal exhaust port/Legends|thermal exhaust port]], Krail pulled out of the trench. The fighter's right [[Engine/Legends|engine]] was blown off, and the rest of the craft exploded shortly after.<ref name="ANH" />
